text.message: What a board to have been tabbed out on...
#25 Global? 2  word name? Yep, that's a Dandydrew burner
Oop, nvm, you've been high in multiple recent seasons
Guess it's not a burner after all
No way you're going for that...
Welp, red still securing his road network
I'm the only one without a city
You really trying to secure that road, huh
How is it aggro if the knight was on my tile
sorry black to take ur ore, was more targeted at bblue
Rough to hold with his production
He'll get his 8th point then connect
Guess more afraid of red plowing
You're making me settle on desert
Cause of the dang road you placed
u can road settle there its fine
i just did that in case i have to push for road
You prob did it cause I need to city first anyway
And you have plenty of time tot ake it
im telling u i wont take it unless i have to
and blue is giving red 2 for 1s
my b next time ill jsut let you win ;)
There's not enough cards to do it
if u build roads and didnt city i wouldve fed road but i cant let you habe open settle and hold road
